    Enum ExifLightSource

    The exif light source.

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.Exif.Enums
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public enum ExifLightSource

    Cloudyweather

    The cloudyweather.

    CoolWhiteFluorescent

    The cool white fluorescent.

    D50

    The d50 value(5000K).

    D55

    The d55 value(5500K).

    D65

    The d65 value(6500K).

    D75

    The d75 value(7500K).

    DayWhiteFluorescent

    The day white fluorescent.

    Daylight

    The daylight.

    DaylightFluorescent

    The daylight fluorescent.

    Fineweather

    The fineweather.

    Flash

    The flash.

    Fluorescent

    The fluorescent.

    ISOstudiotungsten

    The iso studio tungsten lightsource.

    Otherlightsource

    The otherlightsource.

    Shade

    The shade.

    StandardlightA

    The standardlight a.

    StandardlightB

    The standardlight b.

    StandardlightC

    The standardlight c.

    The unknown.

    WhiteFluorescent
